name: Tianjin Jieqiang Power Equipment Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Jieqiang Power Equipment Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells nuclear, chemical, and biological defense equipment for the military industry. Its products include hydraulic and electric drive systems, hydraulic self-generators and air compressors, and decontamination devices. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Tianjin, China.
